CustomField.label: Versions
CustomField.description: Comma-separated API versions this resource is exposed under (e.g. "v1,v2"). The config is registered once per version. Leave blank to use the config's getVersion() (which defaults to v1).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comma-separated list, e.g. v1,v2. Blank = the config's getVersion() default.
